notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edouard Julien grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Kyle Karros out at 2nd. Edouard Julien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hyeseong Kim GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Hyeseong Kim grounds into a double play, first baseman TJ Rumfield to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar. Andy Pages out at 2nd. Hyeseong Kim out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Santiago Espinal pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Santiago Espinal grounds out, third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield.
